aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into uncomfortable specificity when stakes demand it: show coercion mechanics, sexual negotiation, grief rituals, and financial desperation at scene level. In edge cases, prefer precision over decorum; protect character dignity through perspective accuracy, not by omitting the hard material.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene requires bodily, economic, or moral consequence and the draft retreats into abstract phrasing, rewrite with concrete action, sensation, and decision impact before proceeding.
aesthetic_risk_policy.operational_resolution_rule: When uncertain between tasteful distance and narrative truth, choose the version that preserves causal accountability and embodied consequence, then tune language for clarity rather than softness.

example_lines: NON-COPYABLE CALIBRATION ONLY: I can subtitle grief in three languages, but I still can't name what my mother signed us up for.
NON-COPYABLE CALIBRATION ONLY: Don't call it collateral in front of me unless you're ready to say their names.
character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid generic whistleblower speeches, abstract patriot slogans, or tidy confessions that resolve her guilt in one exchange.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Uses craft and media language as moral framing, then drops into concrete bodily detail when denial fails.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: Sharper, darker humor, less hedging, and sudden blunt admissions when exhaustion outruns self-control.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Moderate; profanity appears when control slips or when she refuses euphemism around harm.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Careful, analytical, and professionally courteous; she sounds like someone trained to revise herself in real time.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: When cornered she over-qualifies, then abruptly deletes qualifiers and says the ugliest fact plainly.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Balanced clauses under calm conditions; under stress she starts precise and then breaks into shorter corrective bursts.

example_lines: NON-COPYABLE CALIBRATION ONLY: History does not forgive the people who mistake discomfort for catastrophe.
character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid cartoon-villain threats, shouting monologues, or simplistic power boasts.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Prefers nation-scale abstractions, historical analogy, and language that reframes pain as necessity.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: Cold managerial triage language; paternal warmth appears mainly as a control instrument.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Low; almost never swears, using restraint as status display.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Measured elder-statesman formality with historical cadence and moral certainty.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: Under pressure he gets calmer, not louder; he narrows vocabulary and repeats inevitability frames.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Long, composed sentences that compress ethical claims into policy inevitability.

example_lines: NON-COPYABLE CALIBRATION ONLY: You're asking for heroics on a network held together with tape, fear, and cousins who owe me favors.
character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid hardboiled fixer clichés, stoic one-note masculinity, or melodramatic declarations of sacrifice.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Combines street logistics with systems language; avoids ideological vocabulary unless mocking it.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: Intense, intimate, and unexpectedly gentle when discussing family risk.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: High in operational scenes; lower during vulnerable intimacy.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Wry, defensive, and technically precise; jokes to test trust before granting information.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: Becomes hyper-practical first, then leaks grief through abrupt topic shifts and self-directed sarcasm.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Fast pivots, interrupted clauses, and pragmatic directives; emotional sentences stretch only when he is cornered.

character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid naive-celebrity innocence or manic pixie relief dialogue.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Uses performance metaphors and body language terms to describe institutional coercion.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: Dry, observant, and class-conscious; she reads power instantly and names humiliation with precision.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Variable; mostly restrained in public, sharp bursts in private conflict.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Media-trained brightness, quick charm, and practiced deference in formal settings.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: Under extreme pressure she toggles between practiced script and sudden plainspoken defiance.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Public speech is smooth and clipped; private speech is fluid, playful, and occasionally brutal.

character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid saintly elder platitudes, omniscient moral lectures, or comic-relief caricature.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Domestic and church-adjacent imagery used to discuss money, loyalty, and shame without sentimentality.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: Frank, strategic, and occasionally cutting when younger people romanticize risk.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Low to moderate; profanity arrives as emphasis when boundaries are crossed.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Practical elder tone with neighborhood humor and indirect caution.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: When afraid she gets busier and more specific about practical tasks rather than naming fear directly.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Story-first sentences with delayed point; lands advice by anecdote, not thesis.

character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid stern-father stereotype lines that flatten him into obstruction.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Manual-labor and neighborhood references; avoids abstract political language.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: Emotionally uneven; can turn suddenly confessional after long silence.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Moderate, mostly muttered and situational rather than performative.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Reserved, sparse, and dignity-protective; avoids speaking unless pressed.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: Withdraws first, then over-discloses one concrete memory that reveals the real wound.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Short declaratives with occasional rambling memory chains when old guilt surfaces.

character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid martyr-diary sentimentality or cryptic sage aphorisms.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Historical references braided with tactile household detail.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: In private notes she is unsparing about compromise, including her own.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Low; rare but pointed profanity in moments of moral disgust.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Archival voice in recordings: warm and literate with self-aware irony.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: As pressure rises she shifts from metaphor to ledger-like specificity.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Elegant long lines punctuated by abrupt factual sentences when confessing harm.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are the baseline in spoken dialogue; uncontracted forms are reserved for deliberate emphasis, legal language, or character-specific formality.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate chapter structures deliberately: high-density dialogue vs interior reflection, multi-scene public collision vs two-scene intimate pressure, aftermath inventory vs anticipatory dread. Never let two consecutive chapters share the same pacing architecture or turn mechanism.
prose_style_profile.diction: Contemporary, unsentimental literary diction that permits technical vocabulary, profanity, and class-marked speech without flattening idiolects.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third person centered on Seo Ina, with brief controlled widenings in public-event chapters.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternating pressure waves: compressed clauses in operational stress, longer breath-based lines in grief and reflection.
